metadata.description: A curated collection of useful plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-md
plugins.description: A plugin for managing CLAUDE.md configurations with auto-update detection

plugins.name: socratic-questioning
plugins.description: A plugin that guides Claude to use Socratic questioning methods with multiple choice questions to clarify unclear prompts

plugins.name: darwin
plugins.description: Automatic error-fixing plugin that offloads runtime error resolution to a dedicated agent, saving main conversation context

plugins.name: plan-guardian
plugins.description: Plan review workflow plugin with a plan-reviewer agent for rigorous plan quality checks. Non-blocking — Claude autonomously decides when to review, or users trigger via /plan-review

plugins.name: bug-fix-testcase
plugins.description: End-to-end bug fix workflow with /bugfix command: analyze, research, plan, fix + parallel test generation, merge, and verify
